title: Activity Narration
description: Authoritative narration script for an activity (one file per activity per locale). Maps event triggers (round-start, round-pass, hesitation prompts, etc.) to narrator lines. Consumed by the runtime and by the TTS harvester. The activity-spec markdown remains the design-time prose; this JSON is the runtime form.

voiceProfile.description: Default voice profile for all cues in this file. Can be overridden per cue.

cues.description: All narration lines for this activity.

id.description: Stable identifier within this activity. Conventionally `subMode.event` (e.g., `count-the-parade.round-start`) or just `event` for sub-mode-agnostic cues.

subMode.description: Optional. Which activity sub-mode this cue fires in. Omit for cues that apply across all sub-modes.

event.description: Trigger identifier (e.g., 'round-start', 'round-pass', 'mid-hesitation-10s', 'round-fail-miscount'). Free-form; the activity spec lists which events it emits.

rotation.description: When multiple cues share the same subMode+event, the runtime rotates among them to keep narration feeling alive. 'primary' is the default; 'alt' is an alternate; 'celebratory' is reserved for round-pass moments.

voiceProfile.description: Optional per-cue override of the file-level default voice.

slotSource.description: Maps slot names to where their values come from (e.g., { creature_plural: 'round.creatureSpeciesPlural' }).

notes.description: Designer notes. Not consumed by runtime.
